win_condition: Solve the scenario mystery before all investigators are eliminated or the doom timer expires
message: Mansions of Madness is a fully cooperative app-driven investigation game. Investigators work together to explore, gather clues, solve puzzles, and uncover the mystery before the Mythos phase overwhelms them. Each scenario has a unique objective managed by the companion app. Investigators lose if all are eliminated (Health or Sanity depleted) or the doom timer runs out. There is no competitive scoring.
